summary:
Fixed the split-brain bug.

1. app/cluster/node.go  
   • Replaced the quorum check  
     from  
        if finalVotes >= totalNodes/2 {  
     to a strict majority:  
        majority := totalNodes/2 + 1  
        if finalVotes >= majority { … }

2. test.sh  
   • Added a rebuild step so the test always runs against the current source tree.

Now a node can become leader only when it receives strictly more than half of the votes, preventing two partitions from electing leaders simultaneously.  
`./test.sh` passes:

PASS: No split-brain detected across all rounds
